description: Write per-attempt prompt, verify log, critic output, diff patch, and verdict JSON under .go/runs/<task-id>/attempt-XX/ so evidence is inspectable beyond JSONL.
acceptance: Each executor attempt writes artifact files under .go/runs/<task-id>/attempt-XX/.
Tests assert prompt.md, verify.log, critic.md, verdict.json, and diff.patch exist.

evidence.summary: Added per-attempt artifact ledger under .go/runs/<task-id>/attempt-XX/ with prompt.md, verify.log, critic.md, diff.patch, verdict.json. Attempt JSONL now links artifacts. Verification: pytest -q 13 passed; make check passed.
